body.title: config/profiles/igor.yaml — minimal viable profile for round-trip test
body.result: Canonical igor.yaml at config/profiles/igor.yaml. Validated against profile loader. agent_datacenter commit 6f3867a.
body.description:
Author the canonical Igor profile per design § 4.3. Lives at /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/config/profiles/igor.yaml (canonical, repo-checked-in). Sync-on-install copies to ~/.agent_datacenter/profiles/ at runtime (sync mechanism is slice 2/3 work; slice 1 reads from canonical path for the test).

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/config/profiles/igor.yaml (NEW)
**Design rules:** canonical-in-repo, runtime-read-from-runtime-dir
**Scope boundary:** in — full Igor profile YAML matching design § 4.3 (devices_allow_list, devices_overlay, channels, state_refs, permissions, surfaces); out — cc.yaml/research-orca.yaml (slice 2), inheritance markers (slice 5)
**Test plan:** ensured by T-announce-slice1-round-trip-test (the file is consumed there); standalone YAML lint via pyyaml load
